Describe the sequence of key events shown in the video, including specific timestamps for each action.
canonical_answer: At 4s, red curtains open to reveal silver machines; at 8s, a man plugs a black cord into a wall outlet; at 10s, the man pours pink hot dogs from a foil tray into the roller; at 16s, a family sits around a table eating sausages outdoors.
